title: radiola multiflora
intro: Radiola multiflora, also known as Radish or Wild Radish, is a perennial plant belonging to the Brassicaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as constipation and diarrhea, due to its anthelmintic and carminative properties. The health benefits of Radiola multiflora include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Radiola multiflora can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote digestive health and alleviate symptoms of various gastrointestinal disorders.
